description: Upgrade the 'A simple model rocket' kit loaded in OpenRocket to fly on mid-power motors. Modify the design by increasing the Inner Tube inner diameter to 24.0 mm and replacing the motor configuration with an Estes E9 motor. Ensure the rocket maintains a stability margin of at least 1.0 cal by adding a Mass Component of at least 15g inside the Nose Cone. Increase the parachute diameter to at least 40.0 cm to accommodate the increased weight. After running a flight simulation to confirm safety, save the modified design to ~/Documents/rockets/mid_power_upscale.ork. Document the new motor, the nose weight added, the parachute diameter, and the simulated maximum altitude in an upgrade report at ~/Documents/exports/upscale_report.txt.
